Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core

Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.group

package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.group
Group and collection types for FlixelGDX.

FlixelGroup is a generic SnapshotArray wrapper for any member type (useful in plain libGDX projects). FlixelBasicGroup adds FlixelBasic update/draw/recycle/destroy semantics.

FlixelGroup.remove(T) and FlixelGroupable.detach(T) only unlink members. For FlixelBasic members, prefer FlixelBasic.kill() / FlixelBasic.revive() or FlixelBasicGroup.recycle(). See FlixelBasic for a lifecycle table.

FlixelBasicGroupable marks groups whose members are FlixelBasic for engine utilities (overlap, debug traversal).

See Also:
  • FlixelState
  • FlixelBasic
  • FlixelGroupable
  • FlixelBasicGroupable
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx
    The core package of the FlixelGDX framework.
  • Class
    Description
    FlixelBasicGroup<T extends FlixelBasic>
    A FlixelBasic that owns a FlixelGroup of other FlixelBasic members, with batch FlixelBasicGroup.update(float) / FlixelBasicGroup.draw(Batch), FlixelBasicGroup.recycle(), and FlixelBasicGroup.destroy() that tears down members.
    FlixelBasicGroupable<T extends FlixelBasic>
    A FlixelGroupable whose members are FlixelBasic instances.
    FlixelGroup<T>
    Framework-agnostic member list backed by a SnapshotArray.
    FlixelGroupable<T>
    Group-like containers with a typed member list.
    FlixelSpriteGroup
    A special FlixelSprite that can be treated like a single sprite even when made up of several member sprites.
    FlixelSpriteGroup.RotationMode
    Controls how a FlixelSpriteGroup's rotation affects its members.
